name: Beet & Cucumber Salad W/Orange Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the head of leafy green lettuce into individual leaves. Wash and blot dry with paper towel.
2. Gather half the leaves together and cut crosswise into 1-inch wide strips. Repeat with the romaine lettuce.
3. Arrange the lettuce and romaine leaves alternately around the inside edge of a large salad bowl, filling the center with shredded lettuce and romaine.
4. Cover the salad with damp paper towel and refrigerate until serving time.
5. Scrub and cut the cucumber lengthwise, then crosswise into thin half-moons. Place in a plastic bag and refrigerate.
6. Combine 3 tbsp orange juice, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tbsp honey, 2 tsp Dijon style mustard, 2 tsp orange grated rind, and 1/2 tsp salt in a small bowl.
7. Whisk in 2/3 cup vegetable oil until well blended.
8. Refrigerate the dressing until ready to use.
9. Pour about half the dressing over the lettuce strips and toss to coat.
10. Arrange cucumber pieces in circles in the center, and shredded beet around the cucumbers.
11. Serve with remaining dressing.
